problem id: dbc197e0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11000000 -> 00110000
  00000100 -> 00000001
  10111011 -> 10101110
  01011001 -> 10010110
  10100000 -> 00101000
  11100110 -> 00111001
  11111100 -> 00111111
  11000001 -> 10110000

query: 11101101
predicted answer: 10111011
